title: Cipher Mining Inc (CIFR) Q3 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue Growth and Strategic HPC Expansion
text: Cipher Mining Inc (CIFR) Q3 2025 earnings demonstrated strong financial progress. Revenue reached $72 million, representing a 65% increase from the prior quarter's $44 million. Net loss improved significantly to $3 million versus $46 million in Q2. Adjusted earnings of $41 million (up 34% quarter-over-quarter). The company mined 629 Bitcoin during the quarter. Hash rate capacity expanded by 40%. Fleet efficiency stood at 16.8 joules per tera hash, among industry's most efficient levels. The company completed a landmark $1.3 billion convertible debt offering that was seven times oversubscribed. Executed a transformational 15-year lease agreement with Amazon Web Services for 300 megawatts, projected to generate approximately $5.5 billion in contract revenue. Treasury holdings of approximately 1,500 Bitcoin. The strategic developments showcase the company's transition from traditional Bitcoin mining to high-performance computing infrastructure provider, positioning it to capitalize on growing demand for AI data center capacity.
